meta.description: Verified examples of how universities define graduate application periods. These describe granularity, not current application dates.

policies.notes: MIT describes graduate admissions as decentralised. Departments determine timelines, and degree programmes have their own requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Early Fall 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The central timeline is approximate; use each programme page for an exact deadline.

policies.notes: Many courses remain open until full; some departments use fixed application rounds shared by taught postgraduate courses.
Applicants submit by the deadline set by the intended graduate programme.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Mid-September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The central application opening is announced, while deadlines remain programme-specific.

policies.notes: Oxford's central guide applies broadly, but individual course pages define deadlines and some courses use separate application processes.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Guidance expected mid-September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Oxford says guidance for applications made in 2026-27 will be available from mid-September 2026.

policies.notes: Harvard Griffin GSAS states that application deadlines vary by programme and are listed on the relevant programme page.

cycleGuidance.opensText: September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The degree programme application becomes available in September; no exact day is stated.

policies.notes: The specific deadline depends on the course and on whether the applicant is applying for funding.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications open; deadlines vary by course
cycleGuidance.notes: Cambridge's directory is open for 2026/27, but each course has its own deadline and may close early.

policies.notes: Caltech generally accepts graduate applications once yearly, while requirements and exceptions are controlled by academic options. Not all options admit directly to the M.S.; some award it only on the Ph.D. path or in special terminal cases.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Generally 21 Nov–15 Dec
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page gives a recurring month/day range without an explicit application-cycle year, so no exact calendar record is published.

policies.notes: Master's windows are shared across programmes but differ by prior degree origin and scholarship/direct-doctorate category.

cycleGuidance.notes: The applicable window depends on the country of the applicant's Bachelor's degree and scholarship/direct-doctorate status.

policies.notes: Each UCL prospectus page states its own deadlines. Deadlines commonly differ by visa requirement, and courses may close earlier than advertised.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Check each course; many are currently open
cycleGuidance.notes: Admissions take place throughout the year, with visa-specific deadlines on individual course pages.

policies.notes: NUS separates research and coursework routes and directs applicants to individual programme pages for programme-specific requirements and application details.
HKU's taught postgraduate directory publishes deadlines and application status on individual programme and study-mode pages. Programmes may use multiple rounds.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Check each programme page
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc Computer Science page publishes main and clearing deadlines but does not expose an exact application opening date, so no complete calendar window is published.

policies.notes: NTU coursework programmes publish their own intake availability and application periods. Some programmes admit in August only, while others also admit in January.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Dates vary by programme
cycleGuidance.notes: The Master of Computing in Applied Artificial Intelligence lists a 1 November to 31 March period for the August 2026 intake.

policies.notes: PKU publishes a standard international graduate application period, while English-taught master's programmes and special academies may use separate notices and portals.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 20 October to 23 December 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The standard international route is closed; English-taught master's programmes may have different deadlines.

policies.notes: Tsinghua's international graduate application period generally runs from September to February, but departments and programmes define their own batches and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Programme-specific rounds within the September 2025 to February 2026 cycle
cycleGuidance.notes: The Advanced Computing programme published an exact second-round window from 1 January to 27 February 2026.

policies.notes: Penn's graduate programmes are organised by school. Penn Engineering publishes one shared master's timeline, with an additional early deadline for selected programmes.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 15 September 2025 to 1 February 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Penn Engineering's regular master's window is shared across its on-campus master's programmes.

policies.notes: Cornell's Graduate School supplies the central application, while graduate fields and professional programmes publish their own admission terms and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central application generally reopens in early September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Cornell gives only an approximate central opening. The Computer Science MEng publishes recurring February 1 and October 1 deadlines without an exact opening day for each intake.

policies.notes: Yale GSAS programmes evaluate applications independently and publish programme-specific deadlines. The central application opening is shared, but the exact deadline depends on the programme.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Mid-September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The exact opening day is not yet published. Yale lists 2 January 2027 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern time as the Computer Science MS deadline.

policies.notes: CUHK uses a shared Graduate School application commencement date, but each taught and research programme publishes its own deadline or application rounds.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications commenced 1 September 2025 at 09:00 Hong Kong time
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc in Computer Science closed on 31 January 2026. Other CUHK taught programmes use different rounds and deadlines.

policies.notes: UNSW publishes standard term deadlines for many undergraduate and postgraduate degrees, while faculties, high-demand programmes, applicant routes, and grouped offer rounds may use different dates.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications are accepted through the relevant UNSW or UAC portal
cycleGuidance.notes: The published 2026 term table gives closing dates but not a precise opening day, and the Master of Information Technology is subject to grouped offer rounds and capacity.

policies.notes: Johns Hopkins graduate admissions are administered by its schools and programmes. Engineering for Professionals uses a separate route for part-time online and hybrid master's programmes.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications accepted year-round
cycleGuidance.notes: The tracked Engineering for Professionals Computer Science MS accepts applications at any time and therefore has no finite application window.

policies.notes: UC Berkeley directs applicants to individual graduate programmes because requirements and deadlines differ. The MEng is offered once yearly for Fall, with department-specific instructions.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact dates not yet published
cycleGuidance.notes: The EECS MEng page still displays the closed Fall 2026 cycle and its 14 January 2026 deadline, but does not state the exact opening day.

policies.notes: EPFL uses a common master's application process for applicants with external degrees. Published application periods are shared broadly, while eligibility and programme requirements remain programme-specific.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Mid-November to 15 December, or 16 December to 31 March
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page states recurring month/day periods without binding them to a calendar year, so no exact calendar window is published.

policies.notes: Graduate coursework dates are published on individual course pages and may differ by intake and applicant type. Applicants may apply before the listed closing date while the course is accepting applications.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications can be submitted before each course closing date
cycleGuidance.notes: The Master of Information Technology lists 30 November 2026 for the February 2027 intake and 31 May 2027 for the July 2027 intake, but no exact opening day.

policies.notes: UChicago graduate applications are managed by individual divisions and programmes. Requirements, rounds, and deadlines vary by programme.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application is open; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The MS in Applied Data Science lists several exact deadlines through 23 June 2026, but its page does not state the exact opening date required for a complete calendar window.

policies.notes: TUM master's application periods are defined by the individual degree programme. The Informatics MSc accepts applications for both winter and summer semesters.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Informatics MSc: 1 February–31 May for winter; 1 October–30 November for summer
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page publishes stable month/day periods without an explicit cycle year, so they are retained as recurring guidance rather than exact calendar records.

policies.notes: Fudan publishes separate notices for international English-taught and Chinese-taught postgraduate routes, scholarships, and special programmes. The applicable period depends on the selected route and programme.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 13 October–12 December 2025 and 1–31 March 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The official English-taught postgraduate admissions brochure publishes two complete application phases for international applicants.

policies.notes: Princeton admits graduate students for fall entry only. Departments publish their own deadlines and degree availability, including whether a master's route accepts direct applications.

cycleGuidance.opensText: September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The exact Fall 2027 opening day and Computer Science deadline are not yet published. The current Computer Science page still shows 15 December 2025 for Fall 2026.

policies.notes: Sydney publishes standard postgraduate coursework dates by semester and domestic or international applicant category. Individual courses may use exceptions or close early when capacity is reached.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Generally two years before the semester start date
cycleGuidance.notes: Standard postgraduate closing rules are 31 January or 15 July for domestic applicants and 18 December or 29 May for international applicants. Exact course pages take precedence.

policies.notes: ANU application dates differ by domestic or international applicant route, semester, and programme. Programme pages may publish earlier exceptions to the general closing dates.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 2027 direct applications are currently open; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: Domestic direct applications close 13 February or 17 July 2027. International applications generally close 15 December 2026 or 15 May 2027, with earlier programme exceptions.

policies.notes: McGill states that graduate deadlines vary by programme. Its programme directory publishes the available intake, opening month/day, and domestic and international deadlines for each route.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Computer Science MSc opens 15 September
cycleGuidance.notes: The thesis MSc lists 15 December for international applicants and 15 February for domestic applicants. The non-thesis MSc lists 15 December for both, but the page does not bind these dates to a calendar year.

policies.notes: Monash has a central international application process; course pages still define programme-specific requirements and dates.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: The School of Graduate Studies directs applicants to each graduate unit for application procedures and deadlines. Programme pages list degree availability and current-cycle deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: October 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Computer Science states that Fall 2027 applications will open in October 2026, but the exact opening day and deadline are not yet published.

policies.notes: HKUST taught postgraduate programmes publish programme-level rounds and use rolling admissions. Applicants should follow the dates on the selected programme page.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc in Information Technology lists three deadlines for local and non-local applicants: 1 November 2025, 1 January 2026, and 1 March 2026. The page describes admissions as rolling.

policies.notes: PSL master's applications use several national and institution-level platforms. The applicable calendar depends on the programme, study year, applicant profile, and operating PSL institution.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 15 January–24 February or 17 February–16 March 2026 for the main platform groups
cycleGuidance.notes: The tracked Master Informatique is listed under the Mon Master route for eligible profiles, with an exact 17 February to 16 March 2026 window.

policies.notes: Edinburgh postgraduate taught programmes publish their own application status and deadline. High-demand programmes may close after a fixed deadline and can extend only if places remain.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications usually open in October 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science MSc is closed for September 2026 and lists a 31 March 2026 deadline. The exact next-cycle opening day and deadline are not yet published.

policies.notes: SJTU publishes a central international graduate window with earlier scholarship deadlines. Some schools, including Computer Science master's programmes, also require a supervisor acceptance letter.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications opened 15 October 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The official guide lists scholarship deadlines on 15 December 2025, 15 February 2026, and 31 March 2026, with self-supported applications closing 31 May 2026.

policies.notes: King's normally opens postgraduate taught applications centrally, while each course page publishes its own application status, closing-date guidance, requirements, and exceptions.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications usually open in mid-October for the following September
cycleGuidance.notes: The Advanced Computing MSc is currently marked open, but the official guidance does not expose an exact opening day and its accessible course content does not state a finite closing date.

policies.notes: SNU publishes central international graduate admission windows by spring or fall entry, while domestic and professional graduate routes use separate notices.

cycleGuidance.notes: The official Spring 2027 international graduate guide gives a complete online application and document-upload period in Korea Standard Time.

policies.notes: University of Tokyo graduate schools and departments publish separate entrance-examination guides and short application periods. The Department of Computer Science accepts master's applications only through its summer examination.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 29 May-4 June 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The IST application page gives a complete summer application period. The Computer Science guide states that its master's programme does not accept winter-examination applications.

policies.notes: Manchester taught master's courses set programme-specific admissions processes. High-demand Computer Science programmes use staged selection deadlines and may close when capacity is reached.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: Advanced Computer Science lists 7 November 2025, 2 January 2026, 27 February 2026, and 22 May 2026 selection deadlines. Later applications depend on availability.

policies.notes: UQ has a central postgraduate coursework admissions route; specific programme pages may define additional entry requirements and start terms.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: Yonsei Graduate School publishes central international-student application periods for spring and fall entry. Department-specific interviews or performance assessments may follow.

cycleGuidance.notes: The official international-student schedule gives a complete application period for Fall 2026.

policies.notes: Columbia GSAS provides central graduate admissions guidance; schools and departments set programme-specific requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: IP Paris master's applicants use either the IP Paris portal or Mon Master according to programme and applicant profile. The IP Paris portal publishes common sessions, while some programmes may omit the third session.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 29 October 2025-28 May 2026 across three sessions
cycleGuidance.notes: The first two IP Paris portal sessions are common dated windows. The third session ran 27 March-28 May 2026 but is not represented as a general window because some programmes did not open for it.

policies.notes: Northwestern graduate admissions are handled through The Graduate School and individual programmes set requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: UBC Graduate and Postdoctoral Studies provides the central application/admission route; each graduate programme sets detailed requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: Zhejiang University publishes separate annual international postgraduate guides and programme-specific notices. Scholarship routes may close earlier than self-funded applications.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact next-cycle dates not published
cycleGuidance.notes: The international admissions listing should be monitored for the next annual postgraduate guide. No complete 2027 application period is currently published.

policies.notes: TU Delft publishes common dates for general MSc programmes, with earlier deadlines for selected programmes and different deadlines by EU/EFTA status.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications open 15 October
cycleGuidance.notes: Computer Science is in the selected-programme group with a 15 January deadline for non-EU/EFTA applicants. EU/EFTA applicants use the 1 April deadline. The page does not label these dates with a cycle year.

policies.notes: UCLA Graduate Education provides central admissions guidance; departments set detailed programme requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: PolyU taught postgraduate programmes use rolling admissions with programme-level early, main, and extended deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 2 July 2025 to 30 April 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc in Information Technology had early and main deadlines on 15 October 2025 and 15 January 2026, followed by an extended deadline on 30 April 2026.

policies.notes: University of Michigan Rackham provides the central graduate application route for Rackham programmes; programme pages define detailed deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: CityU taught postgraduate programmes use programme-level pages and deadlines. The official site currently presents an Incapsula challenge to cloud-hosted requests.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact next-cycle dates not verified
cycleGuidance.notes: Keep the programme page under monitoring and use a targeted alternate runner if the cloud-IP challenge persists.

policies.notes: Korea University's Graduate School publishes a central semester schedule and separate programme eligibility or language requirements.

cycleGuidance.notes: Online applications closed on 13 March, while supporting documents were accepted until 17 March 2026.

policies.notes: NTU's Office of International Affairs publishes central international degree application rounds. Departments and graduate institutes add programme requirements.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 1 October-13 November 2025 and 1 December 2025-15 January 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The international admissions page publishes two complete September-entry rounds.

policies.notes: Carnegie Mellon provides central graduate admissions guidance; colleges and programmes set specific requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: UM publishes central intake periods by level, study mode, and programme category. Clinical, coursework, mixed-mode, research, and diploma routes can use different windows.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 9 February to 30 August 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The central calendar covers Malaysian and international applicants to coursework and mixed-mode master's and doctoral programmes.

policies.notes: Bristol has a central postgraduate application route; individual taught postgraduate programmes publish programme-specific details.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: NYU schools manage graduate admissions separately. Tandon publishes school-wide MS milestones with programme-specific intake exceptions.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: Tandon lists 1 December for fall priority consideration and 15 March as the extended final on-campus MS deadline. Computer Science MS does not accept spring applications.

policies.notes: KU Leuven states that programmes have their own requirements and deadlines. Its application-window tool determines the applicable deadline from academic year, nationality, and programme.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the official application-window tool
cycleGuidance.notes: The tool confirms that academic year 2026/27 starts on 16 September 2026, but a single deadline cannot be generalized across nationalities and programmes.

policies.notes: UvA central Master application guidance applies broadly; each Master programme can set specific admission requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: LMU programmes set their own admissions calendars. The former MSc Data Science is discontinued; the current Statistics and Data Science MSc publishes semester-specific recurring dates.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 1 April-15 May for winter; 2 October-15 November for summer
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page publishes recurring strict deadlines without attaching a year, so these remain guidance rather than a cycle-specific formal window.

policies.notes: LSE uses a central graduate application process while programme pages define programme-specific requirements.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: KFUPM publishes project-based master's programme listings and directs applicants to its central study application flow. Exact dated windows were not present on the programme listing.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Start application from the official Apply page
cycleGuidance.notes: The listing asks applicants to note the upcoming cycle and start the application, but does not publish an opening and closing date pair.

policies.notes: Kyoto graduate schools publish separate annual entrance-examination guides. The Graduate School of Informatics guide covers multiple master's courses and intakes.

cycleGuidance.notes: The Informatics guide gives a postal submission period of 5-19 June 2026; in-person submission is accepted on 19 June only.

policies.notes: KAIST publishes international graduate admission timelines centrally. Spring 2027 is dated as August 18 to September 1, 2026; Fall 2027 is marked TBA on the timeline page, so fall dates remain unverified until updated.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Spring 2027: August 18, 2026; Fall 2027: TBA
cycleGuidance.notes: The page also describes general fall admissions as early December-late December for early track and early March-late March for regular track.

policies.notes: Brown Graduate School provides central admission guidance; programmes set detailed requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: Lund's international master's programmes use Sweden's central University Admissions system. The selected programme page identifies the intake and whether applications are open but does not retain the completed opening and closing date pair.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Closed for applications
cycleGuidance.notes: The Machine Learning, Systems and Control programme starts on 31 August 2026 and is marked closed. Exact application dates are not displayed on the current programme page.

policies.notes: UT Austin Graduate School provides central application guidance; graduate programmes set detailed requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.

policies.notes: Sorbonne Computer Science master's applications are routed through Mon Master, Campus France, or eCandidat depending on nationality, residence, and target year.

cycleGuidance.notes: The page gives only a month range for Campus France applicants and directs other applicants to Mon Master or eCandidat, so no general exact window is recorded.

policies.notes: Paris-Saclay master's applications use Mon Master for most M1 routes and the university INCEPTION platform for M2 and listed exceptions. Dates vary by route and applicant situation.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use Mon Master calendar or programme-specific INCEPTION dates
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page states that INCEPTION opening dates are specific to each programme and shown in each programme's application section.

policies.notes: UWA coursework master's such as the Master of Information Technology admit at the beginning of the year and mid-year. The course handbook directs applicants to the Future Students site and online application without publishing exact opening or closing dates.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Beginning-of-year and mid-year intakes; apply via UWA online application
cycleGuidance.notes: The handbook lists beginning-of-year and mid-year commencement but no exact application opening or closing dates; coursework applications are assessed on a rolling basis.

cycleGuidance.opensText: New entrant registration 6-11 August 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page states that 2026 registration has closed and publishes a tentative admission schedule; applicants with already approved leveling courses used 30 July-5 August 2025, while new entrants used 6-11 August 2025.

policies.notes: Heidelberg's Master in Data and Computer Science is access- and admission-restricted and administered by the Faculty of Mathematics and Computer Science. The university deadline page lists recurring application periods for both intakes without a specific cycle year, applying equally to German and international applicants.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Winter semester 1 August to 15 September (previous year); summer semester 1 February to 15 March
cycleGuidance.notes: For access- and admission-restricted master's programmes the page lists application periods of 1 August to 15 September (of the previous year) and 1 February to 15 March, applying equally to German and international applicants. No cycle year is attached, so no formal dated window is recorded.

policies.notes: Queen's University Belfast publishes an official Postgraduate Taught 2026 course catalogue.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The official postgraduate taught 2026 catalogue is accessible, but exact application opening or closing dates were not captured in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: The earlier Graduate School and how-to-apply paths were stale or blocked; the current course catalogue is retained.

policies.notes: The official admissions portal exposes Admissions 2026 and separate Bachelor, Master, MBA, DBA, PhD, and foreign applicant routes. Exact master application-window dates were not captured in the static pass.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Admissions 2026 portal is available
cycleGuidance.notes: Use the Master's programme and foreign applicant routes for exact KazNU application windows.

policies.notes: NYCU's Office of International Affairs publishes a Degree-seeking Students section with International Students admissions, application announcements, application fees, and international admissions links.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The OIA admissions folder confirms the international degree-seeking admissions route, but no exact current application opening or closing dates were captured in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: Older guessed NYCU OIA short paths returned 404; the current OIA folder path is retained.

policies.notes: The official postgraduate taught catalogue exposes Cardiff master-level course routes. Applying pages intermittently returned 403 from the current environment, so exact application-window dates were not captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Course catalogue available; dates not captured
cycleGuidance.notes: Use the selected Cardiff course page and postgraduate applying guidance for exact deadlines.

policies.notes: Hokkaido University's central graduate admissions overview explains that applicants must find and contact a supervisor, then check the target graduate school's website for application procedures. It lists Information Science and Technology among graduate schools.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should complete supervisor contact at least six months before intended enrolment and then check the relevant graduate school's website for how to apply.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official central page is reliable route guidance, but no current Information Science and Technology window dates were captured.

policies.notes: Queen's University School of Graduate Studies and Postdoctoral Affairs publishes a central graduate application page and directs applicants to programme-specific requirements and the online application.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central page explains how to apply to graduate programmes and links to the online application, but no exact institution-wide opening or closing dates were captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: Programme pages should be checked for individual admissions requirements and deadlines.

policies.notes: MSU Graduate School states that graduate admissions are decentralized and applicants should contact the department or programme for requirements, deadline dates, admissions procedures, and other essential information.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should contact the department/programme of interest for deadline dates and admissions procedures.
cycleGuidance.notes: The old CSE deep links currently resolve to a general department page in this environment, so no Computer Science-specific current window is recorded.

policies.notes: Emory University Laney Graduate School welcomes applications and states that it offers over 40 doctoral and master's programs across several disciplines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central Laney Graduate School admissions page links to application, programs, funding, and international applicant guidance, but exact programme deadlines were not captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: This is promoted under the central graduate admissions standard; earlier CS-specific deep links returned 404.

policies.notes: UCT provides central postgraduate application guidance; faculties/departments define programme-specific requirements.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: TU Dresden states that concrete application deadlines are listed in SINS on each degree programme page under application modalities. Application portal choice depends on citizenship, degree type, and prior qualification; graduate applicants with a foreign university degree generally use uni-assist unless an exception applies.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Concrete deadlines are listed per degree programme in SINS
cycleGuidance.notes: The central deadlines page gives doctoral enrolment windows but not a universal master's deadline.

policies.notes: Universidad de Chile's official postgraduate catalogue lists Magíster en Ciencias, mención Computación, Doctorado en Computación, and Magíster en Tecnologías de la Información.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central postgraduate catalogue confirms computing-related master's routes but does not expose exact application window dates in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: A direct DCC programme path tested in this pass returned 404, so the catalogue is recorded as reliable programme presence only.

policies.notes: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam publishes a central master's programmes overview and related master study-choice route, but the current accessible pages did not expose central application deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central master's overview and programme list are accessible, but exact application opening or closing dates were not captured in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: Several guessed application-deadline URLs returned 404, so programme-specific pages should be checked in a later quality pass.

policies.notes: The official postgraduate portal exposes Doctorados, Maestr?as Presenciales, Maestr?as en L?nea, Especialidades, and Admisiones y Becas navigation. Exact master application-window dates were not captured in the static pass.

policies.notes: Curtin has central postgraduate application guidance; course pages define programme-specific requirements.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: HIT lists international master's degree eligibility, documents, online application system, September-only intake, and a May 31, 2026 deadline for September 2026 intake. The page says applications are open all year round, but no exact opening date is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications are open all year round; deadline May 31, 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: No exact opensAt is recorded because the official page only says applications are open all year round.

policies.notes: NCKU OIA publishes a central international degree and dual-degree application schedule for Fall 2026 and Spring 2027; selected departments or institutes may require additional documents, interviews, or tests.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Fall 2026: December 20, 2025; Spring 2027: July 1, 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The schedule applies to international student degree and dual-degree admission applications.

policies.notes: TU Wien publishes a central admission page for bachelor's, master's, and doctoral programmes and directs applicants to admission deadlines and the Admissions Office.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central admission page instructs applicants to note admission deadlines and identifies the Admissions Office as the first point of contact, but exact dated master's windows were not captured in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: The master programmes page confirms TU Wien master's study routes; a later pass should target the admission-deadlines subpage.

policies.notes: Universitas Indonesia provides a central admissions portal; faculties and programmes define specific graduate requirements and schedules.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: The official studies catalogue is reachable and is the current University of Bern degree-programmes entry point. Older master/admission/deadline paths returned 404, so exact master application-window dates were not captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Degree programmes catalogue available; admission dates not captured
cycleGuidance.notes: Use the selected University of Bern programme page for current admission and deadline details.

policies.notes: UOW has central application guidance; course pages define programme-specific details.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central graduate admissions route; exact dates remain programme-specific unless a central deadline page is published.
cycleGuidance.notes: Replaced earlier computer/data-science programme page with institution-level graduate admissions guidance.

policies.notes: UCLouvain publishes a central application route and a calendar whose deadlines vary by nationality, residence, visa need, prior diploma, and application type.

cycleGuidance.opensText: General deadlines include 31 March 2025 for non-EU non-resident visa applicants, 13 September 2025 for eligible foreign diploma profiles, and 30 September 2025 for Belgian/eligible domestic profiles.
cycleGuidance.notes: These are central profile-based deadlines from the official calendar; programme-level exceptions may still apply.

policies.notes: The University of Reading publishes central master's application information and says most master's programmes do not formally close, while some programmes specify deadlines on course pages.

cycleGuidance.opensText: For September admission, Reading recommends UK applicants apply by 1 August and international students requiring a visa apply by 1 July; programme-specific deadlines appear on course pages where applicable.
cycleGuidance.notes: The page states applications may still be considered after the recommended dates, so these are not recorded as formal closing windows.

policies.notes: The official Otago masters page is reachable and covers research/thesis master degree study. Postgraduate apply and important-dates pages returned 403 from the current environment, so exact application-window dates were not captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Masters study page available; application dates not captured
cycleGuidance.notes: Use the selected Otago qualification page and postgraduate application route for exact dates.

policies.notes: Universidad Complutense de Madrid's Faculty of Informatics master's page lists computing-related master's routes including Formal Methods in Computer Science and other informatics/engineering master's programmes.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The official Faculty of Informatics page lists master's programmes for the 2025/2026 and 2026/2027 cycles, but no exact application opening or closing dates were captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: The central master's admissions URL tested in this pass returned 404.

policies.notes: King Abdulaziz University publishes a central postgraduate admission page for master, executive master, doctoral, diploma, international admission, and scholarship routes.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the central postgraduate admission page and admission portal; exact dates depend on admission route and programme group.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page was updated on 2026-06-15 and links to the postgraduate admission portal, guide, procedures, and conditions.
